title: Creating 3D Models from Datasets
author: Schlehlein, Heidi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This SOP covers the entire technical 3D modeling procedure: segmenting organs from datasets in Slicer, modifying them in ZBrush, aligning new organs with the already created VH bodies, using Maya to add “metadata”, and exporting the models with metadata. It also includes common tips for Maya and ZBrush for the 3D modeler to reference.  It is intended for the 3D modeler as a breakdown of the technical steps but does not encapsulate the full communication or responsibilities of this process.
steps_raw: This SOP covers the entire technical 3D modeling procedure: segmenting organs from datasets in Slicer, modifying them in ZBrush, aligning new organs with the already created VH bodies, using Maya to add “metadata”, and exporting the models with metadata.
